_comment: The brand-new room a save starts with (Room.newDefault). furniture = placed ground items (c,r interior cell, facing 0-3, on = powered); wallItems: c -1 means 'the right wall' (resolved to the room width); inventory/starterStock = [{id,n}] lists. starterStock is ALSO seeded into existing saves that miss the id (new-content migration), inventory only into brand-new rooms.
